titleStmt.title: SII 36.244: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 244. (A.R. No. 244 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Nāchchiyar shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Records that an individual, Cīrāmadūtar, consecrated the images of Perumāḷ, Pirāṭṭi and Iḷaiyāḻvān in the temple of Madurāntaka Viṇṇagar in Madurāntakanallūr in Kanṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇayiṟ-kōṭṭam. The Nagaram of Kaḍāraṅkoṇḍachōḻapuram in Pāsāli-nāḍu of Maṇayir-kōṭṭam ageed to supply one uri of oil for lighting two lamps in the temple. (See No. 245)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaṉilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=tamaṇimuṭicūṭi Eṉai mannavarririyaluṟṟuḻitarat tikkanattun=tan cakkaranaṭātti Avanimuḻutuṭayāḷoṭu vicayābhiṣekam paṇṇi vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāna śakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu nālāvatuk ketirāmāṇṭu maṇayiṟ koṭṭattu pācāli nāṭṭuk kaṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻapurattu nakarattom Ikkoṭṭattu
k kanṟūr nāṭṭu maturān=taka nallūrāḻvān maturān=taka viṇṇakaril nāṅkaḷ cirāmatūtarai Iṭṭu Eḻuntaruḷivitta perumāḷukkum pirāṭṭiyāṟkum Iḷayāḻvānukkum tirunun=tāviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum vaitta Eṇṇai Uri Ivveṇṇai Uriyum Eṅkaḷūṟ cekkile can=tirātittavarai celuttukkaṭavomāka sammatittu vaittom kiṭāraṅ koṇṭacoḻapurattu nakarattom Ippaṭi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ippaṭikku kumārantai tāḻipuracūr Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku cāttantai
Akatti piccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koḷḷan=ta vaṭukan Oṟṟi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku māmpāk kiḻān Eṭṭi cāttai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ceṟuvuḻān karuṇākaran moṭi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku veṭṭantai Akattiūran Araṅkan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaḷattūḻān ppan ponna Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāṭi kiḻān nīlakaṇṭi kovan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṇa vāṇiyan Āccan cāttai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṅkumāran nākaciruṭayān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ne mpayan Aṅkāṭi tiruvālaṅkāṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku māṇikkappori Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku ceṟuvuḻān karuṇākaran vaṭavāyil Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṇantai coman koṟṟan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 36.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
